title: Display of empty string appears as space
body:
I notice that this statement:
```
$display(">%s<", "");
```
will print `> <` (with a space) in Verilator, but `><` (no space) by Modelsim and Icarus.  The SV 2017 spec is very brief on `%s`, but I assume that printing no space is preferable.

I see that the generated C++ has this:
```
VL_WRITEF("> <\n");
```
so I assume that something in `V3EmitCFunc.cpp` has determined that the string is constant and can be inlined, but I can't see where this is happening.

Here is a self-contained example: [display_empty.tar.gz](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/7552568/display_empty.tar.gz)
